units.title: Commander Hawk
units.lore: Named after his father. James Hawk joined the Airforce after his father passed away. Learned to fly the Pterodactylus Gunship. Became known for bravery — flying through a hurricane to save a civilian transport. President Enhet added him to the cabinet as head of the DOD branch. Hawk's love for flying lizards led to the creation of the Quetzalcoatlus Gunship. Hawk IS a T3 Pterodactylus.

units.title: IQ Drone Chassis
units.lore: Born into a family of researchers studying genetic engineering, Iris grew fascinated with manipulation of space itself due to the ancient alien ruins. Her work caught President Enhet's attention. This led to quantum-biological augmentation — abilities that buff troops and vehicles, create barriers and shields — but overuse can cause death. If the augmented individual dies, unstable quantum energy detonates. Despite risks, Enhet authorised the Quantum Augmentation Program.
